summary: Revora schema v2 (refactored). Backend pytest: 15/15 PASS — auth (login/register/me/google-bad-session), data isolation, dashboard summary returning exact seeded values (total_pipeline=37,75,000 / cold=6 / overdue=6 @ 11,57,500 / risk=27,15,000), clients CRUD (new schema company_name/contact_name/language), proposals CRUD with status compute (active≤7d / cold 8-21d / dead >21d), invoices CRUD with auto status (paid/unpaid/overdue + days_overdue). Frontend Playwright: login auto-fills founder@bytehubble.com, dashboard shows exactly 4 cards with correct ₹ Indian formatting (₹37.75 L hero, ₹11,57,500 overdue, ₹27.15 L risk), 14 proposals rows + edit/delete testids, proposal detail with edit/delete-proposal-detail, 12 client cards + client-detail with client-proposals/client-invoices sections, 10 invoice rows, all dialogs (proposal-form/client-form/invoice-form) open, mobile hamburger opens mobile-nav-panel drawer (test had to wait for welcome-toast to fade), logout returns to /login. No critical bugs.

minor.issue: Detail response no longer includes 'activities' field (out-of-scope per refactor) — verified intentional
Returns 502 when Emergent upstream fails network call (test accepts 401/502); could be normalized to 401 for cleaner client error handling

issues: Same dev-only React hydration warning carried from iteration 1: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Caused by Emergent visual-editor instrumentation wrapping dynamic <option> text in <span style='display:contents'>. Cosmetic in dev — does not break functionality, but throws to console. Pre-existing, non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress the Emergent visual-editor <span>-in-<option> instrumentation for the three dialogs (Proposals/Clients/Invoices) — pre-existing dev-only React hydration warning, no functional impact.
(Optional) Consider mapping /api/auth/google/session upstream failure to 401 instead of 502 for consistent client UX on bad session_id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~628 lines (down from 745) but still mixes auth/CRUD/dashboard/migration in one file. Consider splitting into routes/auth.py, routes/clients.py, routes/proposals.py, routes/invoices.py before next prompt.
compute_proposal_status / compute_invoice_status use UTC day boundaries — India-first product may want IST for status flips at local midnight.
migrate_legacy_fields runs on every startup — idempotent and cheap (uses $exists guards) so OK, but for very large DBs consider one-shot migration.
_id correctly projected out of all responses (no ObjectId leak).
bcrypt hashes verified $2b$ format, seed_admin idempotently updates password if ADMIN_PASSWORD env changes, and auto-seeds demo data on first run.
Data isolation verified: a freshly-registered user sees [] for clients/proposals/invoices (owner_id filter on every query).
Pydantic Literal types correctly enforce stage ∈ {sent,negotiating,won,lost} and activity channel/direction enums.

All interactive UI elements have data-testid attributes per spec (proposal-row-{id}, edit-/delete-proposal-{id}, client-card-{id}, edit-/delete-client-{id}, invoice-row-{id}, edit-/delete-invoice-{id}, *-form, *-form-submit, nav-*, mobile-nav-open/panel/close, logout-btn / logout-btn-mobile).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_revora_api.py (rewritten for schema v2 — removed references to old fields name/value/invoice_number and removed-endpoints /touch /mark-paid /ai/draft /dashboard/today; added Google session, data isolation, status-compute, and exact dashboard value assertions)
test_credentials: founder@bytehubble.com / ByteHubble@2025 (pre-seeded, pre-filled on login form). Seed: 12 clients, 14 proposals (3 active + 6 cold + 2 dead + 2 won + 1 lost), 10 invoices (2 paid + 2 unpaid + 6 overdue).
seed_data_creation: Ran /app/backend/scripts/reset_demo.py to wipe and reseed schema v2 demo data before tests (previous iteration had 6-client v1 seed). seed_demo_for_owner is idempotent at startup (skips if data exists).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_revora_api.py — requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://revora-hub.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/ -o addopts='' --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Schema v2 field names: Client.company_name/contact_name/language, Proposal.value_inr/sent_date/last_contact_date/stage, Invoice.invoice_no/amount_inr/due_date/paid_date. Status computed server-side, never typed. Dashboard summary expected values for default seed: total_pipeline_inr=3775000, cold_proposals_count=6, overdue_invoices_count=6, overdue_invoices_inr=1157500, revenue_at_risk_inr=2715000. When testing mobile drawer in Playwright, wait ~3.5s for the post-login Welcome toast to fade before clicking mobile-nav-open, or click with JS evaluate.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Initial Playwright failures on edit-/delete- selector counts were timing — rows hadn't mounted yet after route change; fixed with wait_for_selector on first proposal-row-/client-card-/invoice-row-. Initial mobile-nav-panel failure was the Welcome-back toast covering the hamburger button at the top-left; resolved by waiting for toast to fade.
